scripts.eas:mobile:init: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli init
scripts.eas:mobile:build:ios: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --profile preview --platform ios
scripts.eas:mobile:build:android: cd apps/mobile && pnpm dlx eas-cli build --profile preview --platform android
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter web run typecheck && pnpm --filter mobile run typecheck
